summary.markdown_formatted:
### [Open Claw Meetup Recap @ 0:00](https://fathom.video/share/Bqp_3ef6z4L_vePmhSsjphztmH9KLmuR?tab=summary&timestamp=0)

Ben attended an Open Claw meetup in New York City that had over 700 attendees, much more than expected. He described the event as having a lot of energy, with people wearing lobster-themed attire. The meetup was sponsored by Kilo Claw and Jelly Jelly (founded by a Venmo co-founder). Ben said the demand and attendance was "insane" and that it felt like the early 2021 NFT movement.

### [Automating Meeting Notes and Summaries @ 11:15](https://fathom.video/share/Bqp_3ef6z4L_vePmhSsjphztmH9KLmuR?tab=summary&timestamp=675)

Amanda wants to automate the process of capturing meeting notes and summaries from Fathom calls. Currently she has to manually copy and paste the information from Fathom into a document, which is time-consuming. She would like an agent or automated workflow to handle this, integrating the Fathom data into a tool like Notion or Google Sheets.

### [Scheduling Assistance and Calendar Integration @ 20:43](https://fathom.video/share/Bqp_3ef6z4L_vePmhSsjphztmH9KLmuR?tab=summary&timestamp=1243)

Amanda struggles with the back-and-forth of scheduling meetings, having to manually check calendars and coordinate availability. She would like an agent or automated workflow that can interface with her and Danny's calendars, determine mutual availability, and respond to scheduling requests on her behalf.

### [Automating Investment Memos and Fund Updates @ 31:11](https://fathom.video/share/Bqp_3ef6z4L_vePmhSsjphztmH9KLmuR?tab=summary&timestamp=1871)

Amanda also wants to automate the process of generating investment memos and fund updates. She has examples of content she would like to turn into more comprehensive memos, and would like to leverage AI tools like ChatGPT to help draft these materials. She is open to using Notion or other tools to organize this information.

### [Consulting vs. Automated Workflows @ 34:39](https://fathom.video/share/Bqp_3ef6z4L_vePmhSsjphztmH9KLmuR?tab=summary&timestamp=2079)

Ben discussed the differences between providing ongoing consulting versus building static automated workflows. He offered to help Amanda set up the specific workflows she needs, while also suggesting she could learn to do some of this herself using tools like N8N. They discussed pricing and time estimates for the different approaches.
